hero.title: Complete Management of
hero.description: Organize appointments, clients, professionals, finances, notes, checklists, goals, and reports in a single platform.

virabot.title: Meet
virabot.description: Your intelligent assistant that revolutionizes your business management with cutting-edge artificial intelligence
virabot.question1: How many appointments do I have today?
virabot.question2: How can I improve the occupancy rate?
virabot.answer2: Based on your data, I suggest...
virabot.feature1Desc: Converse naturally with ViraBot as if it were a human assistant. Ask questions about your business and receive instant answers.
virabot.feature2Desc: ViraBot analyzes your data and identifies patterns, trends, and improvement opportunities for your business.
virabot.feature3Desc: Receive practical and personalized suggestions to optimize processes, increase efficiency, and improve results.
virabot.feature4Desc: Automate repetitive tasks and let ViraBot handle the heavy work while you focus on customer service.

features.title: Everything you need
features.description: Powerful features designed for modern scheduling businesses
features.appointmentsDesc: Manage appointments with ease, avoid conflicts, and optimize professionals' time.
features.clientsDesc: Keep complete history of clients, appointments, and services in one place.
features.reportsDesc: Analyze data, track performance, and make decisions based on real information.
features.financialDesc: Control payments, discounts, and attendance automatically. Daily, weekly, and monthly reports with graphs and complete cash flow visibility.
features.efficiencyDesc: Save time with automation and optimized processes for your business.
features.securityDesc: Data protected with encryption and compliance with health regulations.
features.fastDesc: Responsive and fast interface that works perfectly on any device.

pricing.title: Choose the Ideal Plan
pricing.description: Total transparency. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

benefits.title: Why choose ViraWeb?
benefits.benefit1: Reduce administrative time by up to 70%

cta.title: Ready to transform your business?
cta.description: Choose your plan and start using ViraWeb today. See how we can significantly improve your business management.

footer.description: Complete management for modern scheduling businesses.

import.title: Stop wasting hours
import.description: Transform any file into organized data in seconds. Our AI automatically identifies clients, values, and dates.
import.benefit1Desc: Reduce hours of work to mere seconds.
import.benefit2Desc: AI that understands the context of every line in your file.
import.benefit3Desc: Eliminate human typing and transfer errors.
import.benefit4Desc: Drag, drop, and done. No technical configuration required.
import.efficiencyDesc: Companies save up to 15h per week with our automated import. Works with your current files, no technical setup.

motor.title: Your Business Motor
motor.description: Our Client Manager (GDC) is much more than a simple control panel. It is the true central motor, created with all 9 features you need to control manual processes today.
motor.description2: The GDC embraces your entire ecosystem: from treatment and continuous scheduling, the financial arm that ensures everything at the end of the month, to essential daily metrics, and integrates all this into advanced Artificial Intelligence. Incredibly easy to use.
motor.feature1Desc: Maintain full history, precise records and control of all appointments tied individually to each client's file in your business.
motor.feature2Desc: Control your receivables, installment payments, discounts and access a detailed cash flow automatically generated with immense precision in a blink of an eye.
motor.feature3Desc: Absurdly elegant analytical dashboards that tell you the truth about your company's health: track real billing, monthly average ticket and retention rates.
motor.feature4Desc: Forget losing days passing old data. Our AI reads massive PDFs and forgotten spreadsheets to populate your entire online system in a process of less than 2 seconds.
motor.feature5Desc: Your operation gains an exclusive Artificial Intelligence that works 24/7 to extract information that went unnoticed, organize complex records and show you insights.
motor.feature6Desc: Directly align your operation's schedules, configure rigorous screen access permissions, and program individual payment or commission flows for your team.
motor.feature7Desc: Define where you want to go and hit weekly, quarterly and annual goals with your whole team. Watch your growth bar be filled against goals every day.
motor.feature8Desc: The end of losing those urgent reminders loose on paper. Add notes at lightning speed, pin crucial blocks on the main screen for the whole team to read.
motor.feature9Desc: Transform uncertain processes into invincible flows. List continuous routines for your attendants and monitor the status of fulfillment of all vital checklists at the root of the panel.

discord.title: Connect with other
discord.description: Be part of our official Networking Discord. Exchange experiences, strategies and grow together with a community focused on business and scale.

clients.title: Client Management without manual effort.
clients.description: Our OCR AI reads your printed records or PDFs and fills the registration automatically. Save hours of typing and avoid human errors.

ai.title: Your Agenda works for you.
ai.description: ViraBot is not just a bot. It understands the natural language of your patients and manages your schedules intelligently 24 hours a day.
ai.subtitle: Automatic Scheduling
ai.patientText: "Hi, I'd like to book an appointment for Tuesday at 2pm."
ai.botText: "Sure! Timeslot reserved. I just added it to Dr. Roberto's calendar and sent the reminder."

financial.description: Control inflows, outflows, recurring revenues, and professional commissions in one place. Visual reports that help you make decisions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know
faq.q1: Do I need to register a credit card now?
faq.a1: No! The 14-day free trial is completely free of payment details.
faq.a2: Your account goes into sleep mode. You can choose to subscribe to a plan or export your data.
faq.q3: Can I cancel at any time?
faq.a3: Yes, there is no commitment. You can cancel your subscription at any time.
faq.q4: Do I have support during the trial?
faq.a4: Definitely! You will have access to our VIP support via WhatsApp and Email.

problem.title: Is managing your business consuming you?
problem.subtitle: Feeling like the day flies by and nothing gets resolved is the symptom of a broken system.
problem.item1Desc: Hours lost managing schedules, filling spreadsheets and answering the same messages over and over.
problem.item2Desc: Lack of real control over income and expenses. Money disappearing in invisible losses you don't even notice.
problem.item3Desc: Frustrated clients with delays, disorganization and a perception of amateurism in your service.
problem.quote: "The problem isn't you, it's the lack of a smart system."

solution.title: ViraWeb: The Brain of your Business.
solution.description: We're not just another software. We are a complete platform that
solution.check1: Dashboards that show the truth of the facts
solution.cta: It's time to move from operational to manager.

benefits.title: Tangible results for your daily life
benefits.subtitle: We built ViraWeb on three fundamental pillars for sustainable growth.
benefits.item1Desc: Our AI and flow automations handle repetitive work so you can focus on business strategy.
benefits.item2Desc: 360º view of revenue and costs in real time. Identify where you're losing money instantly.
benefits.item3Desc: Everything in the cloud, organized and accessible from anywhere. No more insecurity of losing data or forgetting appointments.

transformation.title: The change is clear. The result is inevitable.
transformation.before1: Spreadsheets that never add up at end of month
transformation.before2: Feeling like you're always putting out fires
transformation.before4: Lack of clarity about expected real profit
transformation.before5: Manual processes that depend on your memory
transformation.after2: Clear view of your business health on your phone
transformation.after3: Routines that run on their own without supervision

features.title: Everything you need in one place

features.checklistDesc: Standardization of tasks and internal processes.
features.remindersDesc: Smart alerts so you never miss anything.

features.goalsDesc: Set and track your business objectives.

demo.subtitle2: Feel the power of an interface built for performance.
demo.overlayText: Liked what you saw? Your real account will have much more.

authority.title: For those who decided that
authority.description: ViraWeb was created for professionals who understood that scale only comes with organization. If you want to grow, you need a solid foundation.
authority.item1Desc: No more taking work home and filling spreadsheets at night.
authority.item2Desc: Know exactly which service is profitable and which is a loss.
authority.item3Desc: Your business runs perfectly, with or without you present.
authority.guaranteeDesc: Start your 14-day free trial with full access to all features. If you don't feel the transformation in your first week, you can simply leave.

finalCta.title: Will you continue in chaos or take control?
finalCta.subtitle: The decision that separates amateurs from successful managers is just one click.

footer.tagline: Elevating business management standards with intelligence and simplicity.
